case_title: CRYSTAL LEI, ET AL VS. MILLSTEIN & ASSOCIATES

docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECEMBER 09, 2016 FOR CONTINUED TRIAL SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MILLSTEIN & ASSOCIATES
(SC-108) ANSWER TO REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT MILLSTEIN & ASSOCIATES
ORDER (SC-108) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT: [X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEI, CRYSTAL FU, BRYANT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MILLSTEIN & ASSOCIATES DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO FEES CHARGED TO THE PLAINTIFFS IN THE AMOUNT OF $9,000.00, THUS RESOLVING ANY DISPUTE THAT PLAINTIFFS MIGHT HAVE REGARDING FEES OWED BY THEM TO THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEI, CRYSTAL FU, BRYANT AS TO DEFENDANT MILLSTEIN & ASSOCIATES
CORRESPONDENCE COPY OF LETTER MAILED TO BRYANT FU FROM DEFENDANT ADVISING MR. FU TO UPDATE HIS ADDRESS WITH THE COURT. RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT MILLSTEIN & ASSOCIATES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED AUG-25-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MILLSTEIN & ASSOCIATES
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEI, CRYSTAL FU, BRYANT AS TO DEFENDANT MILLSTEIN & ASSOCIATES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY LEI, CRYSTAL FU, BRYANT AS TO DEFENDANT MILLSTEIN & ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT MILLSTEIN & ASSOCIATES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2016 - CONTINUED TO DEC-09-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS CRYSTAL LI AND BRYANT FU AND DAVID J. MILLSTEIN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS CRYSTAL LEI AND BRYANT FU WITH WITNESS TONY FU. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MILLSTEIN AND ASSOCIATES' REPRESENTATIVE DAVID MILLSTEIN WITH WITNESSES JASON FELLNER, SAMANTHA WU AND JERALD RICHALDSON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.
